description: Secondary use: Court record in Judaeo-Arabic. An inventory of something (a trousseau? a dead person's estate?). Many valuable goods are listed along with their values, including wristbands (dastaynaq) and lapis lazuli (lāzaward). They were given to Moshe b. Aharon ha-Kohen to be sold. A judge's name is listed at the bottom. Unclear if the Hebrew script in between the lines of Arabic script on verso is part of the same document or a different one. See also T-S 13J33.11 + ENA NS I.23 (PGPID 35755).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
